title: Tile Gallery
description: A modern and responsive Tile Gallery Website built with Next.js. Users can browse, search, and explore detailed tile information with authentication, dynamic routing for modern web development.

title: The Dragon News
description: Dragoon News is a responsive front-end web application build with react that delivers real-time news articles on a variety of topics, complete with user authentication for personalized access.

title: KeenKeeper
description: KeenKeeper is a modern friendship management web application designed to help users stay connected and maintain meaningful relationships.

title: DigiTools
description: DigiTools is a modern and responsive Digital Tools Buying Website built using React.js and Tailwind CSS. It allows users to explore premium digital products like templates, productivity tools, and software services, and purchase them through an interactive cart system.
